chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-36 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 01-02-2019 Mr. Muhammad Kaleemullah Memon, advocate alongwith applicant. SIP Muhammad Ilyas, P.S. Kazi Ahmed. Mr. Zeeshan Ali Burdi, advocate alongwith respondent No.4. = In compliance with order dated 17.01.2019 passed by this Court, alleged abductee Ms. Shama daughter of Muhammad Yaqoob has been produced by SIP Muhammad Ilyas of P.S. Kazi Ahmed. I inquired from Ms. Shama, present in court, as to whether she had been abducted by any one or not? She in reply to the query has submitted that neither she was abducted nor is in wrongful confinement of anyone but she has contracted valid marriage under the law, with respondent No.4 namely Qabil Khan, with her own free will and accord without any pressure and coercion. She further submits that they are living happily as husband and wife. I posted another question, regarding the allegations of her father, she replied in negative and submits that all the allegations leveled by him against the respondent no.4 are false. In view of such statement of alleged detainee Ms. Shama, the purpose of this petitions is served, which stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Irfan Ali
